game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: drag to aim and power the slingshot, release to launch, and tap the bird mid-flight to activate its special skill. Monetization includes in-app purchases for gems (premium currency), used to acquire additional bird cards, spells, or lives, alongside loot boxes for random rewards and optional rewarded video ads.
game_info.description: Launch birds from your slingshot to destroy enemy structures and defeat all pigs to win! Aim carefully, manage your power, and activate each bird's unique special ability mid-flight by pressing SPACE. Collect gems to unlock new birds with different abilities. Complete all levels by eliminating every pig before running out of birds!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Aim the slingshot angle
Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Adjust launch power
SPACE: Launch bird / Activate bird's special ability mid-flight
Z: Use power-up (if available)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and aiming test. This validates that the slingshot can be aimed in different directions and power levels can be adjusted. Tests the fundamental input mechanics before launching.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Cycle through different aim angles using left/right arrows and adjust power using up/down arrows. Perform a few test launches at varying angles and powers to verify the physics work correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The slingshot should respond to all directional inputs, power should adjust smoothly, and birds should launch in the aimed direction with appropriate force. No crashes or stuck states should occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test - Complete level by destroying all targets. This validates the core game loop, collision detection, destruction mechanics, and win condition triggering.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aim strategically at pig structures, launch birds with optimal power and angle, activate special abilities at the right moment to maximize damage. Continue until all pigs are eliminated or birds run out.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully eliminate all pigs within the available bird count, trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state, and display victory screen with final score and gem rewards.
